title: Canada gazette publications - Canada.ca
content:
## New substances: Canada Gazette publications
Orders, notices and other instruments for chemicals, polymers or living organisms issued under the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) are published in the Canada Gazette . These include risk management measures where the Minister of Environment and Climate Change (the Minister) and the Minister of Health suspect that a substance is toxic or may become toxic, and waivers of information requirements. Links to the Canada Gazette publications for these orders, notices and other instruments can be accessed below.

## Services and information

### Significant new activity provisions
The Minister may require information to assess new activities of potential concern

### New substances: Ministerial conditions
The Minister may permit a person to manufacture or import a substance subject to conditions

### New substances: Ministerial prohibitions
The Minister may prohibit the manufacture or import of a substance

### New substances: Waivers of information requirements
The Minister may waive the requirement to provide information on a substance

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
